## Meeting Purpose

[Financial planning and hiring strategy discussion for fwd.digital's growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Targeting 20M ARR by end of year, with potential for 100+ customers](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Aggressive hiring plan: 16 managing editors, 30+ account managers needed ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Series A announcement could significantly boost pipeline (65 to 100+ deals)](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Burn rate projections: \~3M/month by year-end, including high recruiting costs](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Financial Model & Growth Projections

  - [Current ARR: \~$4.44M with 35 active customers](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [Targeting 9.6M ARR ($800k MRR) by end of Q2](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Aiming for 20M+ ARR by year-end, potentially reaching 100+ customers](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Lowering customers per pod from 8 to 4 to improve quality and upsell potential](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [ACB (Average Contract Billing) projections: $13k, with slight growth expected](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Hiring Strategy

  - [Immediate focus on hiring managing directors, editors, and account managers](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Need for 16 managing editors by March to handle projected growth](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Aggressive account manager hiring: 30+ needed ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Engineering headcount projection: 25 by year-end, with higher salaries ($280k avg) to attract top talent](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=2650.0)
  - [Recruiting fees significant: $70k per engineer hire (25% of annual salary)](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=2877.0)

### Operational Challenges

  - [Current team (esp. Kyle) spread thin managing 35 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [Need for better onboarding, training, and performance management](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)
  - [Potential for managing directors to open new business lanes and take on more responsibility](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### Series A Strategy

  - [Announcement timing crucial for leveraging growth and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Could boost pipeline from 65 to 100+ deals quickly](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Balancing aggressive growth with operational stability](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

### Recruitment Tactics

  - [Considering leveraging Somewhere.com for hiring, but costs are high (30% of annual salary)](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3552.0)
  - [Plan to hire in-house recruiters to manage volume and reduce costs](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3499.0)
  - [Exploring international hiring (e.g., Sri Lanka) for cost-effective account managers](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3602.0)

### Burn Rate & Financial Planning

  - [Projecting \~3M/month burn rate by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Including significant recruiting costs, software expenses, and legal fees](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)
  - [Marketing spend set at 15-20% of revenue](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)
  - [Sales commission at 5-6% of revenue](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=2577.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize managing director hires this week](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
  - [Accelerate account manager hiring process immediately](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3452.0)
  - [Focus on recruiter hires to support aggressive hiring plans](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3477.0)
  - [Bridget to negotiate with Somewhere.com and explore alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3552.0)
  - [Marcel to connect with Daniel regarding urgent matter raised by Albert](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=3720.0)
  - [Refine financial model to balance growth projections with operational realities](https://fathom.video/share/oVKbffVsWqoTXxd4wsGE6THEsGnwdLTr?tab=summary&timestamp=2930.0)
